response.step_by_step_log: Identified the first song 'Deal with the devil' by Tia at 00:00 using on-screen text. Performed a search: '"Deal with the devil" Tia Japanese and English lyrics'. Found the lyrics. Identified the second song '丸ノ内サディスティック' by Sheena Ringo at 03:45 using on-screen text. Performed a search: '"丸ノ内サディスティック" 椎名林檎 Japanese and English lyrics'. Found the lyrics. Both songs are performed by the virtual idol throughout the video.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performer (a VTuber from an event) singing two songs. The first song is "Deal with the devil" (Tia), and the second is "丸ノ内サディスティック" (Sheena Ringo). Each song is accompanied by choreography appropriate to the track.

scenes.description: A virtual character performs the song "Deal with the devil" by Tia, accompanied by two background dancers. Text "Deal with the devil" appears at the start.
